Name: Personal
Details: ContentType=File, Email; Tooltip=Non-business data, for personal use only.

Name: Anyone (unrestricted)
Details: ParentId=defa4170-0d19-0005-0002-bc88714345d2; ContentType=File, Email; Tooltip=Organization data that isn't intended for public consumption but can be shared with external partners if appropriate. Examples include customer conversations that don't include sensitive info or released marketing materials.

Name: All Employees (unrestricted)
Details: ParentId=defa4170-0d19-0005-0002-bc88714345d2; ContentType=File, Email; Tooltip=Organization data that isn't intended for public consumption. If you need to share this content with external partners, make sure it's appropriate with data owners and relabel content as General/Anyone (unrestricted). Examples include a company internal telephone directory, organizational charts, internal standards, and most internal communication.

Name: Anyone (unrestricted)
Details: ParentId=defa4170-0d19-0005-0005-bc88714345d2; ContentType=File, Email; Tooltip=Data that does not require protection. Use this option with care and with appropriate business justification.

Name: All Employees
Details: ParentId=defa4170-0d19-0005-0005-bc88714345d2; ContentType=File, Email; Tooltip=Confidential data that requires protection, which allows all employees full permissions. Data owners can track and revoke content.

Name: Trusted People
Details: ParentId=defa4170-0d19-0005-0005-bc88714345d2; ContentType=File, Email; Tooltip=Confidential data for internal/external sharing that can be reshared by trusted recipients.

Name: All Employees
Details: ParentId=defa4170-0d19-0005-0009-bc88714345d2; ContentType=File, Email; Tooltip=Highly confidential data that allows all employees view, edit, and reply permissions to this content. Data owners can track and revoke content.

Name: Specified People
Details: ParentId=defa4170-0d19-0005-0009-bc88714345d2; ContentType=File, Email; Tooltip=Highly Confidential data that requires protection and that can only be viewed by specified people, with limited rights.

Name: Public
Details: ContentType=File, Email; Tooltip=Business data that is specifically prepared and approved for public consumption.

Name: General
Details: ContentType=File, Email; Tooltip=Business data that is not intended for public consumption. However, this can be shared with external partners, as required. Examples include a company internal telephone directory, organizational charts, internal standards, and most internal communication.

Name: Confidential
Details: ContentType=File, Email; Tooltip=Sensitive business data that could cause damage to the business if shared with unauthorized people. Examples include contracts, security reports, forecast summaries, and sales account data.

Name: Highly Confidential
Details: ContentType=File, Email; Tooltip=Very sensitive business data that would cause damage to the business if it was shared with unauthorized people. Examples include employee and customer information, passwords, source code, and pre-announced financial reports.
